details.name: Test 6 - Regression Validation
details.regression_result: Baseline source build blocked by upstream Pentaho Maven dependency access
details.comparison: Current pinned Kettle tag 11.1.0.0-190 could not complete baseline source build/install in this run because upstream dependency fetch returned non-Maven content. Legacy Pentaho endpoint did not return Maven XML (status: 200, content-type: text/html; charset=utf-8, effective URL: https://hitachiedge1.jfrog.io/); direct JFrog artifact endpoint returned HTTP 401 Unauthorized for https://hitachiedge1.jfrog.io/artifactory/pnt-mvn/org/pentaho/pentaho-ce-jar-parent-pom/11.1.0.0-190/pentaho-ce-jar-parent-pom-11.1.0.0-190.pom.
